Submodules

gamac.meta.build module

Persists pickle binaries for fitted meta-classifier and meta-regressor

gamac.meta.build.build_binaries()[исходный код]
gamac.meta.build.build_classifier(extractor, ms, xs, ys, ws)[исходный код]
gamac.meta.build.build_extractor(xs)[исходный код]
gamac.meta.build.build_regressor(extractor, ms, xs, ys)[исходный код]
gamac.meta.build.collect_raw_meta_dataset() → Tuple[List[str], ndarray, ndarray, ndarray][исходный код]
gamac.meta.build.get_smooth_labels(xs, ys, ws)[исходный код]
gamac.meta.build.shuffle_data(l1, l2)[исходный код]

gamac.meta.collector module

Collect and filter partitions for visualisation

class gamac.meta.collector.DatasetForMetaCVI(name: str, reducer: Reducer, original: ndarray)[исходный код]

Базовые классы: object

class gamac.meta.collector.DatasetInfoCollector(dataset: DatasetForMetaCVI)[исходный код]

Базовые классы: object

persist()[исходный код]
save(partition, producer)[исходный код]

gamac.meta.features module

Compute meta-features on available datasets

gamac.meta.features.compute_meta_features(data_path)[исходный код]

gamac.meta.generator module

Generate 2D projections from original datasets and produce partitions for them

gamac.meta.generator.launch(data_name)[исходный код]

gamac.meta.gui module

Launch GUI tool for accessor markup

class gamac.meta.gui.Application(data_for_estimation)[исходный код]

gamac.meta.measures module

Compute internal measures values on available datasets

gamac.meta.measures.compute_measures(data_path)[исходный код]
gamac.meta.measures.traverse_measures()[исходный код]

gamac.meta.orderings module

Transform markups and measure values into strong orderings for markuped datasets

gamac.meta.orderings.compute_orderings()[исходный код]
gamac.meta.orderings.filter_accessors(accessors: List[AccessorResult]) → List[List[int]][исходный код]
gamac.meta.orderings.order_measures(measures)[исходный код]

gamac.meta.premeta module

Select the top of internal measures w.r.t higher correlation with accessor markups

gamac.meta.premeta.compute_pre_meta_dataset()[исходный код]
gamac.meta.premeta.estimate_popularity(scorings: Dict[str, DataScoring], measures_list: List[str]) → ndarray[исходный код]
gamac.meta.premeta.estimate_weights(scorings: Dict[str, DataScoring]) → Dict[str, float][исходный код]
gamac.meta.premeta.select_measures(scorings: Dict[str, DataScoring]) → List[str][исходный код]

gamac.meta.render module

Util to render dataset partitions

gamac.meta.render.scatter_image(x, y, colors, img_path)[исходный код]

gamac.meta.scorings module

Estimate scalar measures scores w.r.t accessors markup

gamac.meta.scorings.calc_disagreement(accessors: List[List[int]]) → float[исходный код]
gamac.meta.scorings.calc_measures_scores(orderings: DataOrdering) → Dict[str, float][исходный код]
gamac.meta.scorings.compute_scorings()[исходный код]

gamac.meta.tuning module

Optimise meta-classifier F1-score by tuning hyperparameters

gamac.meta.tuning.smape_loss(y_true, y_pred)[исходный код]
gamac.meta.tuning.tune()[исходный код]
